name: cc-component-library-monorepo
description: Component library platform for CC ecommerce - Geist-inspired design system

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/design-tokens && npm run build -w packages/ui-library
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/design-tokens && npm run lint -w packages/ui-library
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w packages/design-tokens && npm run type-check -w packages/ui-library
